Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\nabil\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-nabil-Documents-Tyche\\5d98eaae-2d90-4737-a349-b85aa99a249d\\tool-results\\toolu_01MzzrHcrVeoGqYgnnLtmJrX.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
issues = json.loads\(data[0]['text']\)['issues']
for i in issues:
    p = i['priority']['name']
    print\(f\\"{i['identifier']} | {p:8} | {i['status']:15} | {i['title']}\\"\)
print\(f'\\nTotal: {len\(issues\)} issues'\)
")
